organic.title: What is a Blockchain Consensus Mechanism?
organic.snippet: Consensus mechanisms ensure all people in a network can unanimously agree on and verify data that's added to the blockchain.

organic.title: What Is a Consensus Mechanism?
organic.snippet: A consensus mechanism is a set of protocols that allows a distributed network of computers to agree on the state of a blockchain.

peopleAlsoAsk.question: What is the consensus mechanism of blockchain?
peopleAlsoAsk.snippet: Consensus mechanisms are processes in blockchain systems that ensure network agreement, trust, and security without human intervention. Proof of work (PoW) requires energy-intensive computations, while proof of stake (PoS) allocates validation rights based on token ownership.

peopleAlsoAsk.question: Which consensus mechanism does BTC use?
What consensus mechanism does XRP use?
peopleAlsoAsk.snippet: Unlike proof-of-work or proof-of-stake blockchains, XRP utilizes a unique Proof of Association (PoA) consensus mechanism, in which servers called validators come to an agreement on the order and outcome of transactions every 3-5 seconds.

peopleAlsoAsk.question: Which consensus mechanism is most efficient?
peopleAlsoAsk.snippet: While there is no clear winner in terms of the best consensus mechanism, many regard the PoS and PoW systems as being the most effective. The main advantages of PoW (mining) over PoS (staking) is that it offers significantly greater security against 51% majority attacks.
